body: Thanks for the follow-up, Chloe — I appreciated the additional detail on the MRV methodology you shared in your last note. After our internal sync this week, I'm glad to say the team at [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) is aligned on moving forward with a deeper look at [CarbonLedger](orgs/carbonledger). I'd like to schedule a technical diligence call with our climate infrastructure lead sometime in the next two weeks — would you be able to get me a 45-minute window along with access to your data room ahead of that? One thing I'll want to explore is how your ledger architecture handles third-party auditor integrations at scale, since that's come up as a recurring question across our portfolio. Looking forward to continuing the conversation.
